Dooling 6-max Seat #1 is the button
Seat 1: TOJISENIN ($2.38)
Seat 3: Frosty722 ($3.30)
Seat 4: PolarFox ($2.00)
Frosty722 posts the small blind $0.01
PolarFox posts the big blind $0.02
*** HOLE CARDS ***
Dealt to PolarFox [2s Ts Kd 6h 9c]
TOJISENIN folds
Frosty722 calls $0.01
PolarFox checks
*** FLOP *** [Js 2d Ad]
Main pot $0.04 | Rake $0.00
Frosty722 checks
PolarFox checks
*** TURN *** [Js 2d Ad] [6d]
Main pot $0.04 | Rake $0.00
Frosty722 checks
PolarFox checks
*** RIVER *** [Js 2d Ad 6d] [8s]
Main pot $0.04 | Rake $0.00
Frosty722 checks
PolarFox checks
*** SHOW DOWN ***
Main pot $0.04 | Rake $0.00
Frosty722 shows [Qc 4s Qs 7c Tc] (a pair of Queens [Qs Qc Ad Js 8s])
PolarFox shows [2s Ts Kd 6h 9c] (two pair, Sixs and Deuces [6h 6d 2s 2d Ad])
PolarFox collected $0.04 from main pot
*** SUMMARY ***
Total pot $0.04
Board [Js 2d Ad 6d 8s]
Seat 1: TOJISENIN (button) folded on the Pre-Flop
